Container.Name: gridmind-backend
Container.Overview: GridMind Backend — AI-powered solar battery optimiser. Manages scheduling, Octopus Energy pricing, Home Assistant integration, and InfluxDB logging. All runtime settings are configured via the web UI after first launch.
Container.Requires: MariaDB 10.11+ database (can use Unraid's MariaDB container). InfluxDB 2.x is optional but recommended for historical data.

Config.Name: API Port
Config.Description: GridMind API and WebSocket port. The frontend connects to this port.

Config.Name: DB Host
Config.Description: Hostname or IP of your MariaDB/MySQL server. Use the container name if on the same Docker network, or the Unraid IP if using the host network.

Config.Name: DB Name
Config.Description: Database name. Must exist before first start (GridMind will run migrations automatically).

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Logging verbosity: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, or ERROR.
